description_zh: 每个人都应该追求自己的人生。用标签重塑自我认知的社交实验正在酝酿，试图打破碳基社会的固有模版。
description_en: Everyone deserves to pursue their own path. A social experiment using labels to reshape self-perception—breaking free from carbon society's templates.

details.text_zh: 灵感来源：现实社会中充满了各种标签（星座、MBTI、职业等），我们试图用 AI 解构这些标签。
details.text_en: Inspiration: Society is full of labels (zodiac, MBTI, career, etc.). We're using AI to deconstruct them.

details.text_zh: 核心玩法：用户通过与 AI 的多轮对话，生成独属于自己的'人生图鉴'。
details.text_en: Core mechanic: Users generate their unique 'Life Atlas' through multi-turn conversations with AI.

details.text_zh: 哲学思考：这不仅是娱乐，更是对自我身份认同的一次深度探索。
details.text_en: Philosophical angle: This isn't just entertainment—it's a deep exploration of self-identity.

details.text_zh: 开发进度：目前处于模型微调阶段，预计年底上线。
details.text_en: Progress: Currently in model fine-tuning phase, expected to launch by year end.
